name: mumu-model-router
description: Model routing plugin that allows different agents and subagents to use different models and API endpoints. Provides configuration for model selection, custom API base URLs, and agent-specific model overrides.

sync-models.description: 同步模型配置并更新所有 Agent 的模型设置

features.model_routing: Route different agents to different AI models
features.api_endpoint: Configure custom API base URLs per agent
features.cost_optimization: Route simple tasks to cheaper models
